title: ApexExtra
description: Added some skills from Apex Legends
body:
Download this mod to restore the legendary skills and equipment from Apex Legends in Minecraft as much as possible.

This mod allows you to use the skills from Apex Legends in Minecraft. We have already implemented some legendary tactical skills and plan to support trick skills and passive skills in the future.

Why should you download this mod?
- Experience the unique gameplay of Apex Legends within Minecraft.
- Enjoy and use those distinctive legendary skills, adding new tactical and strategic options to your game.

Before downloading, you need to know:
- This mod is actively being developed, with more trick skills and passive skills planned for future updates.
- Ensure your Minecraft version is compatible with the mod to guarantee proper functionality and a smooth gaming experience.
